case_title: KIM NGUYEN VS. MT CONSULTING SERVICES, INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT MT CONSULTING SERVICES, INC.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-03-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, KIM AS TO DEFENDANT MT CONSULTING SERVICES, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-27-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MT CONSULTING SERVICES, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-03-2019 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,835.00 FILED BY NGUYEN, KIM AS TO DEFENDANT MT CONSULTING SERVICES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-03-2019 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, KIM IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MT CONSULTING SERVICES, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-03-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-03-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF KIM NGUYEN IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY NON COURT CERTIFIED VIETNAMESE INTERPRETER EDDY DOAN. DEFENDANT MT CONSULTING SERVICES, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MONICA MAI TRAN. THE NON CERTIFIED INTERPRETER WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETER OATH BY CLERK R. SAHATJIAN. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
